channel.title: Posts on Gilhooley
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Gilhooley

item.title: Yield Considered Unhelpful
item.description: I had the idea for this post after reading Linus’s take on the yield syscall. It’s worth a read if you haven’t seen it, although I will be summarizing his points. I also think that the take missed a larger conversation about the APIs that a platform gives its users, and how that shapes correct user behavior. What is ‘yield’? The function in question is sched_yield. It is a very simple function that ‘yields’ the remainder of your thread’s time back to the scheduler.
